sent_simp: 伊斯兰教和基督教都属于正教。
sent_trad: 伊斯蘭教和基督教都屬於正教。
pinyin: Yīsīlán jiào hé Jīdū jiào dōu shǔyú zhèngjiào.
english: Both Islam and Christianity are considered orthodox religions.

sent_simp: 十支球队将角逐这次冠军。
sent_trad: 十支球隊將角逐這次冠軍。
pinyin: Shí zhī qiúduì jiāng jiǎozhú zhè cì guànjūn.
english: Ten teams will contend for the championship this time.
